name: Drawing on you. - Mind ; Chonny Jash
description:
On a boring day, you decide to bother Mind and get him to draw on your arm with one of your favourite blue pens.

As promised, you guys get your automaton freak (positive)

Honestly, Mind's voice is so ethereal to me. Serenade me you little song...bot?? Saying bird sounds wrong. Heart's the bird. This has nothing to do with the bot, I apologize.

I did NOT expect the holiday Soul bot to hit. 1.2k chats?? You guys are fucking wild!!! I love you!!! /p But seriously, that's just cool to me.

Originally I wanted this to be an angst bot, but I don't do fluff enough so I am making myself create more.

I want his mechanical hands ON me.

This time I did NOT include the pre-personas for Heart, Soul and Whole. WHAT?!?!??! I want to experiment with the guts of my bots and give a bit more creative freedom without error to you guys. Let me know how that turns out. Or don't, I don't care. I mainly wanted to experiment with the pronoun macros this time around.
creator: Y0ULLN3V3RKN0WWH4T14M
